# HC ServiClean — Project Architecture

> Living document. Updated at each major push checkpoint.
> Last updated: 2026-04-06

## Overview

**Site:** https://hcserviclean.com
**Business:** HC ServiClean LLC — residential house cleaning, Fishers, Indiana
**Tech:** Astro 4 + Tailwind CSS 3 (static output → GitHub Pages)
**Branch:** `feature/modernize-astro` → merges to `master` → auto-deploys

## Local Development

```bash
# Prerequisites: Node.js 20+
npm install
npm run dev        # → http://localhost:4321
npm run build      # builds to dist/
npm run preview    # preview production build locally
```

## Deployment

Push to `master` → GitHub Actions builds → deploys to GitHub Pages.

**Required one-time GitHub setting:**
Repository Settings → Pages → Source → select **"GitHub Actions"** (not "Deploy from branch").

The `public/CNAME` file maps the custom domain `hcserviclean.com`.

## Tech Stack Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| SSG | Astro 4 | Zero JS by default, island architecture, static output = perfect for GitHub Pages + SEO |
| CSS | Tailwind CSS 3 | Mobile-first utility classes, purges unused CSS at build, no runtime |
| No jQuery | — | Removed: 87KB, not needed. Native CSS + tiny inline scripts replace all behavior |
| No Bootstrap | — | Removed: 29KB JS + 30KB CSS. Replaced with Tailwind + CSS Grid/Flexbox |
| No Font Awesome | — | Removed: inline SVG icons instead (zero external request) |
| Google Fonts | Lato 400+700 | Non-blocking `preload` pattern — no render-blocking |
| Forms | FormSubmit.co | No backend needed. Hashed endpoints already verified on old site |
| Islands | React via `@astrojs/react` | Zero cost now (no islands active). Ready for estimate form Phase 2 |

## Site Structure

```
/           → Home (hero, service highlights, testimonials, CTA)
/services   → Full services page (all 4 service cards with complete item lists)
/about      → About page (why choose us, team info, service area map)
/faq        → FAQ page (general + trust & safety, FAQPage schema for Google rich results)
/estimate   → Estimate form page (Phase 1: FormSubmit.co; Phase 2: React island)
/404        → Custom 404 page
```

## File Structure

```
src/
├── layouts/BaseLayout.astro      ← <head>, SEO meta, JSON-LD, Google Fonts, skip link
├── pages/
│   ├── index.astro               ← Home
│   ├── services.astro            ← Services
│   ├── about.astro               ← About
│   ├── faq.astro                 ← FAQ (includes FAQPage schema)
│   ├── estimate.astro            ← Estimate form
│   └── 404.astro                 ← 404
├── components/
│   ├── Nav.astro                 ← Fixed navbar, transparent→white on scroll
│   ├── Footer.astro              ← 3-column footer, dynamic copyright year
│   ├── home/
│   │   ├── Hero.astro            ← Full-viewport hero, LCP image
│   │   ├── ServiceHighlights.astro ← 4-card grid preview → /services
│   │   └── Testimonials.astro    ← 3-column testimonial cards
│   ├── services/
│   │   └── ServiceCard.astro     ← Service card (props: service: ServiceItem)
│   ├── estimate/
│   │   ├── EstimateForm.astro    ← Phase 1: FormSubmit.co form
│   │   └── EstimateFormIsland.tsx ← Phase 2 scaffold (renders null)
│   ├── faq/
│   │   └── FaqItem.astro         ← Native <details>/<summary> (zero JS)
│   └── shared/
│       ├── SectionHeader.astro   ← Reusable h2 + subtitle + gold underline
│       └── Newsletter.astro      ← Newsletter signup section
├── data/
│   ├── services.ts               ← Edit to change service card content
│   ├── faqs.ts                   ← Edit to add/change FAQ items
│   └── testimonials.ts           ← Edit to add/change testimonials
└── styles/
    └── global.css                ← @tailwind directives + button classes + base styles
```

## Brand Colors

| Token | Hex | WCAG Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| `teal` | `#52b6bc` | Background, border, icon only. NEVER as text on white (2.7:1 fails AA) |
| `teal-dark` | `#3d9aa0` | Hover on teal elements |
| `gold` | `#ffca3c` | Primary button background — always dark text on top (10.2:1 AAA) |
| `gold-dark` | `#e6b400` | Hover on gold buttons |
| Body text | `text-slate-700` | On white: 7.5:1 ✅ AAA |
| Headings | `text-slate-900` | On white: 16.8:1 ✅ AAA |

## SEO Implementation

- **Canonical URLs:** Each page passes its own canonical to `BaseLayout.astro`
- **JSON-LD LocalBusiness:** In `BaseLayout.astro` (on all pages)
- **JSON-LD FAQPage:** In `src/pages/faq.astro` (eligible for Google FAQ rich results)
- **Sitemap:** Auto-generated by `@astrojs/sitemap` at build time → `sitemap-index.xml`
- **OG image:** `/images/og-image.jpg` (1200×630)
- **Google Analytics:** Snippet commented out in `BaseLayout.astro` — see instructions below

## Google Analytics 4 Setup

The old UA-127313644-1 (Universal Analytics) is sunset. To enable GA4:
1. Go to https://analytics.google.com → Admin → Create Property → GA4
2. Get the measurement ID: `G-XXXXXXXXXX`
3. Open `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro`
4. Uncomment the GA4 script block and replace `G-XXXXXXXXXX` with your real ID

## Forms

Both FormSubmit.co endpoints are public (already were on the old site). They are hash-based, not API keys.

| Form | Endpoint | Config |
|---|---|---|
| Estimate | `https://formsubmit.co/6474b868cfc023f9e72071099eff7d6d` | Subject: "New free estimate request!" |
| Newsletter | `https://formsubmit.co/18b17300afc0862f33349630a5af1370` | Subject: "Add User To Newsletter Request" |

**Note:** If you ever redeploy to a new domain, FormSubmit.co will send a confirmation email for the new domain. Just click the link in that email to re-activate.

## Editing Content

| Content | File |
|---|---|
| Service cards (title, image, items) | `src/data/services.ts` |
| FAQ questions & answers | `src/data/faqs.ts` |
| Testimonials | `src/data/testimonials.ts` |
| Nav links | `src/components/Nav.astro` |
| Footer content | `src/components/Footer.astro` |
| Business info (address, phone, schema) | `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro` |
| Page SEO (title, description) | Each `src/pages/*.astro` file |

## Phase 2 — Multi-Step Estimate Form

The `/estimate` page is ready for the upgrade. When Phase 2 is built:

1. Open `src/components/estimate/EstimateFormIsland.tsx`
2. Implement the multi-step form (4 steps: contact → address → service → extras+date)
3. In `src/pages/estimate.astro`, replace `<EstimateForm />` with:
   ```astro
   <EstimateFormIsland client:visible formAction="https://formsubmit.co/6474b868cfc023f9e72071099eff7d6d" />
   ```
4. The `EstimateFormData` TypeScript interface is already defined in the island file

The form will hydrate only when visible (`client:visible`) — zero JS cost on initial page load.
